problem: Why do amyloid plaques form in Alzheimer's and can they be cleared?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: Combining Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
